title: Allow reading an architecture-specific manifest from a list with skopeo inspect --raw
body:
the --override-* options don't work now, it may be introduced by #729 is fixed.

```shell
$ git rev-parse HEAD                                                                                                                  
f72e39fc1073441ffc92aca2b46c72f7a5668fc3

$ ./skopeo --debug --override-arch=unknown_arch --override-os=windows inspect --tls-verify=false --raw docker://docker.io/ppc64le/golang
DEBU[0000] reference rewritten from 'docker.io/ppc64le/golang:latest' to 'docker.io/ppc64le/golang:latest' 
DEBU[0000] Trying to pull "docker.io/ppc64le/golang:latest" 
DEBU[0000] Credentials not found                        
DEBU[0000] Using registries.d directory /etc/containers/registries.d for sigstore configuration 
DEBU[0000]  Using "default-docker" configuration        
DEBU[0000]  No signature storage configuration found for docker.io/ppc64le/golang:latest 
DEBU[0000] Looking for TLS certificates and private keys in /etc/docker/certs.d/docker.io 
DEBU[0000] GET https://registry-1.docker.io/v2/         
DEBU[0001] Ping https://registry-1.docker.io/v2/ status 401 
DEBU[0001] GET https://auth.docker.io/token?scope=repository%3Appc64le%2Fgolang%3Apull&service=registry.docker.io 
DEBU[0002] GET https://registry-1.docker.io/v2/ppc64le/golang/manifests/latest 
{
   "schemaVersion": 2,
   "mediaType": "application/vnd.docker.distribution.manifest.list.v2+json",
   "manifests": [
      {
         "mediaType": "application/vnd.docker.distribution.manifest.v2+json",
         "size": 1795,
         "digest": "sha256:a7db5fe778800809dc1cacd6ae4a1c33ce3f4eb8f39d722b358d7fb27b3a1f1c",
         "platform": {
            "architecture": "ppc64le",
            "os": "linux"
         }
      }
   ]
}# 
```
NOTE: expected error like this "no image found in manifest list for architecture **unknown_arch**, OS **windows**"

comments.body:
Thanks for your report.

This is currently behaving as expected, `skopeo inspect --raw` returns the manifest list, which does not depend on the architecture at all.

If you want to see the architecture-specific manifest, you can currently refer to it by digest:
```
skopeo inspect --raw docker://docker.io/ppc64le/golang@sha256:a7db5fe778800809dc1cacd6ae4a1c33ce3f4eb8f39d722b358d7fb27b3a1f1c
```

It does make sense that `skopeo` should be able to do the lookup and just return the architecture-specific manifest, but I that should probably be a new CLI option rather than a change in behavior of an existing one.

skopeo  --override-os=windows inspect --config --raw --tls-verify=false --raw docker://docker.io/golang
Seems to do what you want.
